title: エンディング（ノーマル）

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My first three years with Satono Diamond have
come to a close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has achieved great success in the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, we're still working towards our goal of
making her into an illustrious runner.

text_block_list.name: Dia & Kitasan
text_block_list.text: We're begging you! Pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Rice! Bourbon! We want to race you both!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Which race are you entering next?! We'll enter it
as well!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah! Wh-wh-what do you mean?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We're not satisfied with merely running against
you in a scrimmage. We wish to face you in an
actual race!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-but why us?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We recently had the opportunity to compete
against McQueen and Teio.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I learned so many things racing them.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm still so inexperienced, and I realized I need to
further my studies by running against other
accomplished athletes, such as yourselves.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
So Teio and McQueen suggested that we try
running against you two next!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'm sure we'll be able to learn lots from you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Understood. I have no objections to your
proposal.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Racing the two of you would also be beneficial
for me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um, uh... I-if you really want to race against
m-me, then, um...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yay! Thank you both for agreeing!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome. I'm really excited to run with the
three of you!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
As am I. I will reach out after finding the most
optimal race for all of us.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
And that's how we managed to secure a race with
Rice and Bourbon! ♪
choice_data_list:
Please let me know before you go challenging
people next time...

Please let me know before you go challenging
people next time...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I clutch my head in my hands upon hearing
Satono Diamond's announcement. I can't believe
she just went soliciting people for matches.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to put in a formal request to Rice Shower
and Mihono Bourbon later.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Does that mean I should leave any future race
negotiations up to you?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I'd like to run against Hayahide and
the BNW members next. Oh, and I've also already
promised to race Nature and the others. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
After that, I want to compete against Spe,
Suzuka, and Golshi.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh, and Rudolf too!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! There are so many people I have to
defeat if I want a shot at being the best in
Japan! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond speaks with genuine joy in her
voice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her first order of business as an illustrious runner
is to aim to be the best in the country and
challenge many formidable runners with Kitasan
Black.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That is Satono Diamond's current goal.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm still seeking the strength and purpose fitting
of an illustrious runner...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: So let's have another good training session today!
